name: Freshdesk
description: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support and helpdesk platform by Freshworks. The API lets you manage support tickets, contacts, companies, and knowledge base articles. It supports multi-channel ticketing from email, phone, chat, and social media in a single unified inbox.

capabilities.name: create_ticket
capabilities.description: Create a new support ticket with subject, description, priority, and status. Supports email, phone, and portal as source channels.

capabilities.name: list_tickets
capabilities.description: Retrieve all tickets with filtering by requester, status, priority, agent, and creation date.

capabilities.name: update_ticket
capabilities.description: Update a ticket's properties or add a reply/note. Change status, priority, assignee, or add internal notes for agent collaboration.

capabilities.name: list_contacts
capabilities.description: Retrieve all contacts (customers) in your Freshdesk account with their email, phone, company, and ticket history.

capabilities.name: create_contact
capabilities.description: Create a new contact (customer record) with name, email, phone, and company association.

capabilities.name: reply_to_ticket
capabilities.description: Send a public reply to a customer on an existing ticket. The reply is delivered via the ticket's original channel (email, portal, etc.).

capabilities.name: search_solutions
capabilities.description: Search the Freshdesk knowledge base (Solutions) for articles matching a query. Returns article titles, descriptions, and folder info.
